content.json:
# PiClaw agent observability

Agent-centric workbook template for App Insights.

Primary identity:
- actor = chatJid
- transaction = turnId
- runtime leaf = sessionLeafId

content.query:
union withsource=table dependencies, customEvents
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| extend chat_jid = coalesce(tostring(customDimensions['piclaw.chat_jid']), user_AuthenticatedId, tostring(customDimensions['piclaw.actor.id']))
| where isnotempty(chat_jid)
| summarize events = count() by chat_jid
| top 20 by events desc
content.title: Busiest chat JIDs

content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| where name == 'tool.call'
| extend chat_jid = tostring(customDimensions['piclaw.chat_jid'])
| extend tool_name = tostring(customDimensions['piclaw.tool.name'])
| extend duration_ms = todouble(duration / 1ms)
| where isnotempty(chat_jid)
| summarize calls = count(), p95_ms = percentile(duration_ms, 95), max_ms = max(duration_ms) by chat_jid, tool_name
| top 20 by p95_ms desc
content.title: Slowest tools by JID

content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| where name == 'model.call'
| extend chat_jid = tostring(customDimensions['piclaw.chat_jid'])
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions['piclaw.model'])
| extend duration_ms = todouble(duration / 1ms)
| where isnotempty(chat_jid)
| summarize calls = count(), p95_ms = percentile(duration_ms, 95), max_ms = max(duration_ms) by chat_jid, model
| top 20 by p95_ms desc
content.title: Slowest models by JID

content.query:
union withsource=table dependencies, traces, exceptions
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| extend chat_jid = tostring(customDimensions['piclaw.chat_jid'])
| extend classifier = tostring(customDimensions['piclaw.error.classifier'])
| extend item_name = coalesce(name, operation_Name, message, outerMessage)
| where item_name in ('provider.error', 'log.warn', 'log.error') or isnotempty(classifier)
| where isnotempty(chat_jid)
| summarize events = count() by chat_jid, classifier, item_name
| top 20 by events desc
content.title: Recovery hotspots
